rulings.Case Title: ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MOHSIN AHMMED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 3: DEFENDANT MOHSIN AHMMED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Defendant¿s Request for Judicial notice is DENIED. Defendant raises issues of fact that cannot be properly addressed on demurrer. The Court notes that Plaintiff¿s opposition is filed and served late and not in conformity with CCP 1005. However, opposition is considered as Defendant addressed it on the merits in the reply. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 4: PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction. DENIED. Moving party failed to show material violation of CC 2923.6. Specifically, no evidence is provided that a complete loan modification application was pending when Notice of Default or Notice of Trustee Sale were recorded; and no evidence is provided that trustee sale was conducted. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. REBECCA R BORMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 5: DEFENDANTS REBECCA BORMAN AND RYAN BORMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on Ellis Act. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA LLC. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. BRUCE GAULD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 8: DEFENDANTS BRUCE GAULD AND MUGUEL SERRA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. rulings.Case Title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. NATHANIEL STAHL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 9: DEFENDANT NATHANIEL STAHL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer. Moving party fails to point to any allegations in the complaint or any authority showing that the ¿3 Day Notice¿ is an ¿initial communication with a consumer in connection with the collection of any debt.¿ Amount owed is also sufficiently alleged. Issues of fact are not properly raised on demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PROPERTY INVESTMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. LUCI MARA MARTINS POLLI ET AL (Deft's 170.6CCP as to Judge Cynthia M. Lee)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 10: DEFENDANT LUCI POLLI'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. GRANTED. Defendant shall file her answer no later that August 10, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. and post $12,900 with the Court no later than August 10, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUCIAN BLAZEJ VS. JOSE ORELLANA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 10, 2015, Line 11: DEFENDANT JOSE ORELLANA'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. DENIED: (1) CCP 1013 is not applicable to ¿3 Day Notice;¿ (2) validity of rent increase can not be properly addressed on a motion to quash; (3) rent due is clearly stated; (4) Motion is not properly set for hearing per CCP 1167.4. =(501/REQ)
